6) How to Use This Method

salle

The Checkmark Production Blueprint Method teaches you how to build a song in the correct order so you stay focused, make fewer random decisions, and finish stronger productions. Each stage has one job. Follow the order, complete the task, and move forward.

The 12 Stages ————

Study the Target Add Ear Candy

Create the Song Blueprint Add Ambience & Final Polish

Build the Sound Palette Create the Mix Plan

Create the Musical Parts Execute the Mix

Arrange the Song Create the Mastering Plan

Refine Transitions & Energy Execute the Master

fof soot

STEPS fof of

== Core Principle ——if— ‘4

Plan first. Prepare second. Execute third. Refine last.

The more clearly you plan, the easier the production becomes.
